sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n93550" key="seiragwgeu/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σειρ-ᾰγωγεύς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">έως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n93550.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">cord for leading</tr_> (cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῥυταγωγεύς</foreign>), <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:1:216" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.216</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
